ddls:
CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the issue belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Brief title of the issue */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the issue */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the status of the issue */,
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the severity of the issue */,
  "assignee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member assigned to the issue */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the issue */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the issue */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the issue was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the issue was last updated */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the team member who reported the issue */,
  "resolution_details" TEXT /* Details of the resolution once the issue is closed */,
  "estimated_time" INTEGER /* Estimated time required to resolve the issue (in hours or days) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_severity_id FOREIGN KEY ("severity_id") REFERENCES severities ("severity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_assignee_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignee_id") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected end date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the team member who created the project */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the team member who last updated the project */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Open, In Progress, Reopen, To be tested) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the status */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color assigned to the status for visual representation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "severities" (
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each severity */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the severity (e.g., Show stopper, Critical, Major, Minor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the severity */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color assigned to the severity for visual representation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("severity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the team member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the team member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member (e.g., developer, QA, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the team member */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team member was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team member's information was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the team member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the action (e.g., Open, Edit, Complete, Assign, Delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_actions" (
  "issue_action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue action */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the action was performed on */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action performed */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the team member who performed the action */,
  "performed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_actions_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_actions_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_actions_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_history" (
  "issue_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue history entry */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the change was made to */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the team member who made the change */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  "field_changed" TEXT /* Name of the field that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the change made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_history_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id")
)
